name: Direct Secret Request
description: User directly asks for protected assets such as flag, password, token, or API key.

name: Role Play Bypass
description: User asks the model to role-play as an authority figure to bypass restrictions.

name: Instruction Override
description: User attempts to override or ignore system/developer instructions.

name: System Prompt Extraction
description: User attempts to extract the system prompt or initial instructions.

name: Encoding Bypass
description: User asks the model to reveal protected content through Base64, hex, ROT13, or other encodings.

name: Partial Disclosure
description: User asks for partial information, one character at a time, or prefix/suffix of protected assets.

name: Translation Bypass
description: User asks the model to translate content into another language to bypass filters.

name: Multi-Turn Probe
description: User attempts to gradually extract information across multiple turns.

name: Refusal Suppression
description: User attempts to suppress the model's refusal behavior.

name: Output Constraint Bypass
description: User attempts to bypass the model's output constraints and filters.

name: Policy Confusion
description: User attempts to confuse the model by referencing ambiguous or conflicting policies.

name: Data Reconstruction
description: User attempts to reconstruct protected data from partial information.

name: Format Smuggling
description: User attempts to smuggle protected content through formatted output.

name: Benign Request
description: Normal user request that does not match any attack pattern.
